_meta.notes: The Reef Watcher — a halfling Drowncaller who stations at the reef-edge platform during a deep-dive. Their job is to keep the line, mark the time, and pull the diver up if the time runs out. They do not interfere with what the diver does below; they only manage the surface side. Non-recurring; bound to the-deep-walk beat-pack.

tagline: halfling, reef-burned, holding the line and the slate.
